title: HTTP Request Message
description: Schema describing the structure of an HTTP request message as defined in RFC 9110 (HTTP Semantics) and RFC 9112 (HTTP/1.1).

method.description: The HTTP method indicating the desired action to be performed on the target resource (RFC 9110 Section 9).

target.description: The request target identifying the resource upon which to apply the request (RFC 9112 Section 3.2).

httpVersion.description: The HTTP version used for the request message (RFC 9112 Section 2.3).

headers.description: HTTP header fields that convey additional information about the request or the client (RFC 9110 Section 6.3).

Host.description: The host and optional port of the target URI (RFC 9110 Section 7.2).

Content-Type.description: The media type of the request body (RFC 9110 Section 8.3).

Content-Length.description: The size of the request body in bytes (RFC 9110 Section 8.6).

Accept.description: Media types acceptable for the response (RFC 9110 Section 12.5.1).

Authorization.description: Credentials for authenticating the client with the server (RFC 9110 Section 11.6.2).

User-Agent.description: Information about the user agent originating the request (RFC 9110 Section 10.1.5).

Cache-Control.description: Directives for caching mechanisms in the request chain (RFC 9111 Section 5.2).

If-None-Match.description: Conditional request based on entity tag comparison (RFC 9110 Section 13.1.2).

If-Modified-Since.description: Conditional request based on modification date (RFC 9110 Section 13.1.3).

body.description: The message body containing the payload data of the request (RFC 9110 Section 6.4).
